title: The Parting
content:
Breathless was she and would not have us part:
    "Adieu, my Saint," I said, "'tis come to this."
    But she leaned to me, one hand at her heart,
    And all her soul sighed trembling in a kiss.
meaning:
Maurice Henry Hewlett's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Parting"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
